title: Dark Christmas
description: Face the horror of DARK SANTA!
body:
This mod is a horror advenure where the slightest thing can get you dead! Escape from the stalky and evil santa and survive THE DARK CHRISTMAS! 

The mod adds a new entity - Evil Santa which will you stalk you to see if you're nice or naughty, if you're naughty he'll come for you..

![Mod Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2183c884c00dea0dfa38a0854924815c4f5d10b8_0.webp)


- thanks to [ItsCosmicMC](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsCosmicMC) and @naturenexus03 (on discord) for helping me out with the concept and make sure to try their version of the mod.
